description: External data catalogue for Lunaris. Files are placed under the resolved data root (--data-dir > LUNARIS_DATA_DIR > repository data/) in canonical subdirectories. Entries with "url": null require manual placement from the cited official provider; lunaris-data prints where to put them. URLs target official providers (NASA NAIF/JPL, NASA PDS) and may need updating if a provider reorganizes its archive.
sha256_policy: SHA-256 values for URL-backed entries are intentionally left null in this manifest: they were not computed/verified offline while authoring, and several NAIF generic kernels (e.g. LSK/PCK) are periodically refreshed in place, so a pinned hash could cause spurious verify failures. Until a hash is added, `lunaris-data verify` reports these as 'present, no hash'. To enforce strict integrity, run `lunaris-data download` then compute the SHA-256 of your archived copy and add it here; `lunaris-data verify` will then check it. Do not invent or guess hashes.

datasets.name: naif_lsk_naif0012
datasets.notes: Needed for time conversions in any SPICE-based run. SHA-256 unpinned (see sha256_policy).

datasets.name: naif_spk_de440
datasets.description: JPL DE440 planetary and lunar ephemeris (SPK).
datasets.notes: Large (~100+ MB); de440s.bsp is a smaller short-span alternative. SHA-256 unpinned (see sha256_policy).

datasets.name: naif_spk_de440s
datasets.description: JPL DE440s short-span planetary and lunar ephemeris (SPK).
datasets.notes: Smaller alternative to de440.bsp for shorter time spans. SHA-256 unpinned (see sha256_policy).

datasets.name: naif_pck_pck00011
datasets.notes: Body radii and orientation constants. SHA-256 unpinned (see sha256_policy).

datasets.name: naif_moon_pa_de440
datasets.description: Lunar principal-axis (PA) orientation kernel for DE440 (binary PCK).
datasets.notes: Use together with the moon_de440 frame kernel for lunar body-fixed frames. SHA-256 unpinned (see sha256_policy).

datasets.name: naif_moon_fk_de440
datasets.notes: Defines the MOON_PA / MOON_ME frames used with the PA kernel. SHA-256 unpinned (see sha256_policy).

datasets.name: grail_gravity_jggrx
datasets.description: GRAIL-derived lunar spherical-harmonic gravity coefficients (JGGRX, high degree).
datasets.license_or_terms: See NASA PDS Geosciences Node terms.
datasets.notes: Official URL not pinned (version/host-specific). Download the GRAIL/JGGRX SHADR coefficient file from the PDS Geosciences Node and place it under gravity_models/.

datasets.name: lola_ldem_topography
datasets.description: LOLA LDEM topography raster plus its PDS3 label.
datasets.notes: Official URL not pinned. Download the LOLA LDEM .img raster AND its matching .lbl label from the PDS LOLA archive and place both under topography_models/.

datasets.name: lola_albedo
datasets.notes: Optional. Download the LOLA albedo grid (and matching label, if any) from the PDS LOLA archive and place it under albedo_models/.

datasets.name: st_lrps_cloud_suite
datasets.description: Generated ST-LRPS spatial-cloud train/val/test suite (generated locally, not downloaded).
datasets.notes: Generate with: python -m lunaris.surrogate.st_lrps.data.spatial_cloud_generator. This entry documents the expected location; lunaris-data does not download it.
